title: Omnisend vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Omnisend vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Omnisend and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Brands Wanting Email And Sms Together
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Omnisend wins for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Privy?
faq.a: Omnisend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
